subcommands.name: migrate:latest
subcommands.description: Run all migrations that have not yet been run

subcommands.name: migrate:up
subcommands.description: Run the next or the specified migration that has not yet been run

subcommands.name: migrate:rollback
subcommands.description: Rollback the last batch of migrations performed

subcommands.name: migrate:down
subcommands.description: Undo the last or the specified migration that was already run

subcommands.name: migrate:currentVersion
subcommands.description: View the current version for the  migration

subcommands.name: migrate:list|migrate:status
subcommands.description: List all migrations files with status

subcommands.name: migrate:unlock
subcommands.description: Forcibly unlocks the migrations lock table

options.description: Specify the path to knex instance
Set DB client without a knexfile
Set DB connection without a knexfile
Set migrations directory without a knexfile
Set migrations table name without a knexfile
Specify one seed file to execute
Enable a timestamp prefix on name of generated seed files
